mental_emotional.text: All mental excitement increases suffering. Constant interchange of mental moods

head.text: Aches; worse, bending head forward. Itching of hairy scalp and beard

mouth_throat.text: Feel too long. Pain in teeth. Cracks across tongue. Coated white (Ant cr)

stomach_abdomen.text: Shooting in liver. Pain in spleen

stool_rectum.text: Constant dropping of blood from the anus, no blood from the stools

male.text: Pain in right testicle; better, urinating. Emissions without erection. Impotence. Backache in lumbar region and weak legs. Lewd dreams. Pain in end of urethra; greenish discharge; brown spots on genitals and abdomen

back.text: Pain in back and sacrum; worse while sitting; better, walking or lying. Weakness in legs and backache after emissions

extremities.text: Aching in wrist-joints. Shooting into thighs from liver. Weak knees. Trembling in limbs. Tingling in feet. Foot-sweat, mostly between toes

skin.text: Dry and pimply. Pimples about nates, chin, hairy scalp

keynotes.text: color="#800000">COBALTUM METALLICUM The Metal Cobalt (COBALTUM) Adapted to neurasthenic spinal states. Sexual disturbances. Fatigue, agitation, and bone pains, worse in morning.
